## Scope

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npx prettier --check .`
- [ ] `node remove-bom.cjs`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:integration`
- [ ] `npm run lint:php` when PHP files changed

## Checklist

- [ ] I read the relevant source files before editing.
- [ ] I kept the change inside the approved scope.
- [ ] I did not touch `public/security.php` without explicit approval.
- [ ] I preserved editor HTML storage compatibility.
- [ ] I checked every affected bundled theme, not just one theme.
- [ ] I updated docs and changelog when behavior or release output changed.
